---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Whispr
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Is Your Feature Request Related to a Problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is.  
Example: *"I'm always frustrated when [...]"*

## Describe the Solution You'd Like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Mockups / Examples

If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or links to similar features in other apps.

## Impact on Existing Features

- [ ] This change would add new functionality
- [ ] This change would modify existing behavior
- [ ] This change is purely additive (no breaking changes)

## Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
